Auth.registerDescription: Create an account as a student or mentor.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: We will send you a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
Auth.verifyEmailDescription: We are verifying your email address.
Auth.name: Name
Auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a verification link.
Auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, we sent a reset link.
Auth.emailVerified: Email verified. You can log in now.

errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.token_expired: This link has expired. Please try again.

student.title: Student dashboard
student.description: Your team, tasks, and submissions will appear here.

mentor.title: Mentor dashboard
mentor.description: Manage tasks and review submissions here.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Manage users, teams, and tasks here.
admin.teamsLinkDescription: View and manage all internship teams.
admin.mentorsLinkDescription: Assign each mentor's main responsible group.
admin.tasksLinkDescription: Create and manage tasks for internship groups.

client.title: Client dashboard
client.description: View assigned teams and submissions here.

Team.setupDescription: To participate in the internship, create a new team or join via an invitation.
Team.setupJoinHint: If you have an invitation, open the link from your email or teammate.
Team.createTeamDescription: Fill in your team details and choose your project role.
Team.teamPageDescription: View and edit team details, invite teammates.
Team.teamDetailsReadOnlyNote: Classroom, class, school, and group can only be changed by a mentor or administrator.
Team.teamSizeWarning: Your team has fewer than 2 members. Add teammates before the internship starts.
Team.joinTeamDescriptionGeneric: Join a team using an invitation.
Team.joinTeamLoginRequired: Log in or register to join {teamName}.
Team.tasksPlaceholderDescription: Team tasks will appear here in a later step.

errors.already_in_team: You are already on a team.
errors.role_not_allowed: This role is not allowed for the team's current size.
errors.duplicate_role: For a 3-member team, each role can only be used once.
errors.email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

AdminTeams.description: Browse and manage all internship teams.

AdminTeams.roleValidationWarning: This team has role composition issues:

members.noAvailableStudents: No students without a team are available.

mentors.allAssigned: All mentors are already assigned to this team.

client.label: Assigned client
client.noneAssigned: No client assigned to this team.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

errors.mentor_already_assigned: This mentor is already assigned to the team.

AdminMentors.title: Mentors
AdminMentors.description: Assign each mentor's main responsible group. Multiple mentors can share the same group.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

MentorDashboard.title: Mentor dashboard
MentorDashboard.noMainGroupWarning: You do not have a main group assigned yet. Ask an administrator to assign one before creating or applying tasks.
MentorDashboard.mainGroupDescription: You are responsible for {group} ({teams} teams). You can create and apply tasks only for this group.

permissions.viewAll: View all groups, teams, tasks, and submissions
permissions.createTasks: Create and apply tasks only for your main group
permissions.commentAll: Comment on submissions from all groups

cards.teamsDescription: Browse and edit team details across all groups
cards.submissionsDescription: Review student submissions from all groups

MentorDashboard.emptyTeams: No teams match the selected filters.
MentorDashboard.submissionsReviewNote: Detailed review, comments, and grading will be available in the next step.

Tasks.title: Title
Tasks.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the task. You can use bold text and images.
Tasks.onePerTeamHint: Any one team member can submit a response on behalf of the team.
Tasks.responseTypesHint: Select at least one way students can submit their response.
Tasks.selectGroupsHint: Or select one or more groups:
Tasks.applyToGroupDescription: Create a copy of this task for your main group with a new deadline.
Tasks.reusedTaskNote: This task was applied from another group.
Tasks.alreadyAppliedNote: This task is already assigned to your main group.
Tasks.studentEmptyTasks: No tasks assigned to your team yet.
Tasks.submissionComingSoon: Submissions will be available in the next step.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.no_main_group: You need a main group assigned before creating or applying tasks.
errors.response_types_required: Select at least one response type.
errors.already_in_main_group: This task is already in your main group.
errors.already_applied: This task has already been applied to your main group.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to upload images.
errors.invalid_file: Please select a valid image file.
errors.file_too_large: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.invalid_file_type: Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images are allowed.
